title: B — eds, element, fronius, general
description:
ORTA SEVIYE MARKALAR - Grup B: 4 marka sayfasini icerik zenginlestir (eds, element, fronius, general)

Her sayfayi mevcut ~1200-1500 bytedan 2000+ byte'a cikar.

Markalar:
1. eds — pompa ve hidrofor (EDS Global)
2. element — rezistans, elektrikli isitma
3. fronius — 1945 Avusturya, solar inverter
4. general — Fujitsu General klima

Her markaya eklenecek:
- Kurulus hikayesi (founding year, origin, market position)
- Urun gruplari (detailed product categories with descriptions)
- Gul-tekin uygulama ornekleri (Bodrum application examples)
- Ilgili hizmet sayfalarina CardGroup linkleri
- Gorsel ekleme imkani icin HTML comment (<!-- GORSEL ONERISI: ... -->)

Referans: markalar/grundfos.mdx (iyi gelistirilmis sayfa yapisi), markalar/panasonic.mdx (Tier 1 panel bilgisi)

steps.name: Enrich eds.mdx — EDS Global (Pompa ve Hidrofor)

log.action: Title normalized: stripped legacy task-id reference

log.outcome: Well-structured, thorough specification for enriching 4 mid-level brand pages with structured Turkish content. The mission is clear, steps are highly specific and verifiable, file scope is accurate, and testing requirements are concrete. One important dependency contingency gap exists regarding FN-019 completion, but the core approach is sound and the spec is comprehensive enough for a Plan-Only review level.
